name: chat_resolve_at_reference_to_project_or_model_item_by_display_name
desc: Resolve a user-typed '@' reference to a canonical project or model item.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The text after the '@' token (e.g. 'Grid A', 'Level 02').

parameters.name: type_hint
parameters.description: Optional category hint. One of: level, grid, room, view, sheet, scope_box, titleblock.
